description: Extract a 200x200 meter micro-simulation subnetwork from the Bologna Acosta scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/) centered on the geographic center of the original network (acosta_buslanes.net.xml). The subnetwork should exclude isolated edges. Adapt the original traffic demand from acosta.rou.xml to the new subnetwork. Save the subnetwork to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/micro.net.xml, the adapted routes to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/micro.rou.xml, and create a valid SUMO configuration file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/micro.sumocfg that incorporates the new files and any required original scenario dependencies. Verify the final configuration runs successfully.
